perturbation.original_text: During the Term and subject to the limitations set forth in this Agreement, Naked shall have an exclusive right and license in the Territory to use Athlete's name, nickname, initials, autograph, image, likeness, photographs, biographical details, facsimile signature, voice, videos, electronic media depictions, any words, symbols or other depictions, as well as any other identifying attributes that would identify Athlete to the public, including any trade mark(s), copyrights which Wade has, as set forth on Schedule A attached hereto, and all multimedia assets that Wade owns or has right to use (collectively, the "Wade Image") solely for the advertising, endorsement, promotion, or sale of the Naked Products (including the Wade Products) in the Territory as follows:
perturbation.changed_text: During the Term and subject to the limitations set forth in this Agreement, Naked shall have a non-exclusive right and license in the Territory to use Athlete's name, nickname, initials, autograph, image, likeness, photographs, biographical details, facsimile signature, voice, videos, electronic media depictions, any words, symbols or other depictions, as well as any other identifying attributes that would identify Athlete to the public, including any trade mark(s), copyrights which Wade has, as set forth on Schedule A attached hereto, and all multimedia assets that Wade owns or has right to use (collectively, the "Wade Image") solely for the advertising, endorsement, promotion, or sale of the Naked Products (including the Wade Products) in the Territory as follows:
perturbation.explanation: The change from "exclusive right and license" to "non-exclusive right and license" introduces a direct contradiction within the agreement. Throughout the agreement, the implication is that Naked has the sole right to use Wade's image for Innerwear. Changing it to Non-Exclusive, it can be implied that Wade is able to provide the Wade image to other companies, which is directly contradictory to the exclusivity clause found in Section 4. Exclusivity. Wade agrees that during the Term of this Agreement, he will not represent or perform as a representative, spokesperson or provide Wade Services for, nor furnish services or materials, or allow the use of the Wade Image to be used for the advertising, endorsement, promotion, or sale of Innerwear in the Territory.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 4. Exclusivity. Wade agrees that during the Term of this Agreement, he will not represent or perform as a representative, spokesperson or provide Wade Services for, nor furnish services or materials, or allow the use of the Wade Image to be used for the advertising, endorsement, promotion, or sale of Innerwear in the Territory. Furthermore, Wade will not engage in any business or other transaction or have any financial or personal interest in any entity whose primary or core business is selling or manufacturing Innerwear during the Term. Endorsement of any Innerwear other than the Naked Products or Wade Products without the express written consent of Naked will constitute a material breach of this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The original text granted Naked an "exclusive right and license" to use Athlete's image. The changed text alters this to a "non-exclusive right and license." This change directly contradicts Section 4 (Exclusivity), which states that Wade cannot allow the use of his image for Innerwear by other companies. The change makes it possible for Wade to provide the Wade image to other companies, thus creating a direct and substantial conflict.

perturbation.original_text: Athlete will have the title of "Creative Director" for the Wade Products, which title shall be featured on the Commercial Materials. During the Term and subject to the limitations set forth in this Agreement, the Wade Team and Naked agree that the process for approving designs for Wade Products will be as follows:
perturbation.changed_text: Athlete will have the title of "Consultant" for the Wade Products, which title shall be featured on the Commercial Materials. During the Term and subject to the limitations set forth in this Agreement, the Wade Team and Naked agree that the process for approving designs for Wade Products will be as follows:
perturbation.explanation: The change from "Creative Director" to "Consultant" creates an internal contradiction in the interpretation of Wade's role. The subsequent approval process for designs implies a level of creative control and decision-making that aligns with a "Creative Director" role. Calling him a "Consultant" diminishes his implied level of control in decision making.
perturbation.justification: While the explanation suggests a potential contradiction based on implied control, the provided text does not demonstrate a direct, undeniable conflict. Both 'Creative Director' and 'Consultant' can reasonably be interpreted as roles that involve providing input and approval in the design process, particularly when the 'Wade Team' is also involved. The described approval process in the contradicted text is consistent with either title. Therefore, the change does not create a strong, clear in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: Naked will retain all ownership of the Intellectual Property Rights in connection with the Naked Products, the Naked brand and any and all related brands. All advertising material produced hereunder will be and remain the absolute property of Naked. Wade acknowledges that he does not now have and in the future will assert no right, title or interest of any kind or nature whatsoever therein, or in or to any component part or tape, dub or copy or element or character or characterization thereof.
perturbation.changed_text: Naked will retain all ownership of the Intellectual Property Rights in connection with the Naked Products, the Naked brand and any and all related brands. All advertising material produced hereunder will be co-owned by Naked and Wade. Wade acknowledges that he does not now have and in the future will assert no right, title or interest of any kind or nature whatsoever therein, or in or to any component part or tape, dub or copy or element or character or characterization thereof.
perturbation.explanation: Changing "All advertising material produced hereunder will be and remain the absolute property of Naked" to "All advertising material produced hereunder will be co-owned by Naked and Wade" creates a contradiction within Section 14. Intellectual Property. This amendment contradicts with the section that states - Wade will retain all ownership of the Intellectual Property Rights in connection with Wade Image including, for the avoidance of doubt, the Logo. - Subject to Section 14A, Naked will retain all ownership of the Intellectual Property Rights in connection with the Naked Products, the Naked brand and any and all related brands. - All advertising material produced hereunder will be and remain the absolute property of Naked. All the original statements clearly shows the intention of a separation of ownerships on IP and not co-ownership.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 14. Intellectual Property. All rights to the use of the names, trademarks, service marks, symbols, logos, domain names, trade secrets, confidential know-how, patents, copyrights, any pending applications with respect to any of the foregoing, and any other intellectual property and related proprietary rights, interests and protections ("Intellectual Property Rights") in connection with Wade Products will be jointly owned by Wade and Naked. Wade will retain all ownership of the Intellectual Property Rights in connection with Wade Image including, for the avoidance of doubt, the Logo. For the avoidance of doubt, no rights are being granted hereunder to any intellectual property belonging to the NBA or its member clubs (including but not limited to the Miami Heat). Subject to Section 14A, Naked will retain all ownership of the Intellectual Property Rights in connection with the Naked Products, the Naked brand and any and all related brands. All advertising material produced hereunder will be co-owned by Naked and Wade. Wade acknowledges that he does not now have and in the future will assert no right, title or interest of any kind or nature whatsoever therein, or in or to any component part or tape, dub or copy or element or character or characterization thereof.
perturbation.justification: The original text states that "All advertising material produced hereunder will be and remain the absolute property of Naked." The changed text modifies this to "All advertising material produced hereunder will be co-owned by Naked and Wade." The contradicted text repeats the co-ownership clause. This change directly contradicts the original statement of sole ownership, creating a direct and significant contradiction within the contract regarding the ownership of advertising material produced under the agreement, creating uncertainty and potential disputes.
